events.title: Texas Slim
events.description: Texas Slim hits the stage at The Goat Dallas in Lakewood this Saturday, May 16. Dallas dive blues bar at its finest. No pretension, no attitude — just cold drinks and live music. The neighborhood's favorite for over 20 years. Free admission — no cover. Arrive early to grab a spot near the stage.
events.summary: Texas Slim at The Goat Dallas

events.title: Open Mic Night
events.description: Head to Lee Harvey's this Saturday for Open Mic Night. The definition of a dive bar done right. Lee Harvey's has been the heart of Dallas's local rock scene for decades — cheap drinks, a legendary jukebox, and open mic nights that have launched more than a few local bands. No frills, no cover, always a good time. This is a free, no-cover show — the kind of local music night that makes DFW's neighborhood bar scene worth exploring.
events.summary: Open Mic Night at Lee Harvey's

events.title: Punk Rock Nite
events.description: Head to Double Wide this Friday for Punk Rock Nite. A Deep Ellum institution with a raw edge and even rawer drinks. Double Wide is where punk and rock come to play — local bands most nights, touring acts on weekends. The crowd is eclectic, the energy is high, and the cover is almost always under $10. This is a a show with a small cover — the kind of local music night that makes DFW's neighborhood bar scene worth exploring.
events.summary: Punk Rock Nite at Double Wide

events.summary: Local Rock Battle at Double Wide

events.title: The Texas John Scholars
events.description: Head to Granada Theater this Monday for The Texas John Scholars. Dallas's best mid-size concert venue. A beautifully restored 1940s theater that consistently books acts way bigger than its 400-person capacity would suggest. Stellar acoustics, a full bar, and an intimate layout means every seat is close to the stage. This is a a show with a small cover — the kind of local music night that makes DFW's neighborhood bar scene worth exploring.
events.summary: The Texas John Scholars at Granada Theater

events.title: Ana
events.description: Ana hits the stage at Kessler Theater in Bishop Arts this Wednesday, May 20. Oak Cliff's premier live music room. This restored 1940s movie house in the heart of Bishop Arts hosts local and national acts in a space where you can see the performer's eyes. The beating heart of the neighborhood's music scene. A small cover charge applies. Arrive early to grab a spot near the stage.
events.summary: Ana at Kessler Theater

events.title: Jazz Night with The Dallas Six
events.description: Head to The Balcony Club this Thursday for Jazz Night with The Dallas Six. Dallas's coziest jazz spot tucked into Lakewood. An intimate room that holds maybe 60 people, excellent musicians playing seven nights a week, and BYOB allowed. The Balcony Club is where jazz goes to be serious and the audience goes to listen. This is a a show with a small cover — the kind of local music night that makes DFW's neighborhood bar scene worth exploring.
events.summary: Jazz Night with The Dallas Six at The Balcony Club

events.title: Honky Tonk Friday
events.description: Head to Adair's Saloon this Saturday for Honky Tonk Friday. Dallas's enduring honky-tonk since 1963. No frills, no cover, just cold drinks and live country music every weekend. Adair's is the real deal — the kind of place that makes Deep Ellum what it is. This is a free, no-cover show — the kind of local music night that makes DFW's neighborhood bar scene worth exploring.
events.summary: Honky Tonk Friday at Adair's Saloon

events.title: Weekend Music on the Patio
events.description: Weekend Music on the Patio hits the stage at Truck Yard Dallas in Lower Greenville this Saturday, May 16. Food trucks, cold beer, and live music under the Texas sky. Truck Yard is what outdoor bar dreams are made of — rotating truck vendors, picnic tables, and bands that make summer nights in Lower Greenville something to remember. Free admission — no cover. Arrive early to grab a spot near the stage.
events.summary: Weekend Music on the Patio at Truck Yard Dallas

events.title: Line Dancing Night
events.description: Line Dancing Night hits the stage at Wild Horse Saloon in Fort Worth this Saturday, May 16. Fort Worth's premier country music and line dancing venue in the heart of the Stockyards. A little bit Nashville, right here in DFW. Two-step lessons, live country bands, and a dance floor that fills up fast on weekends. A small cover charge applies. Arrive early to grab a spot near the stage.
events.summary: Line Dancing Night at Wild Horse Saloon
